problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Plasma. Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
